failure_summary.root_condition: pnpm install aborted due to lockfile mismatch, preventing dependencies from installing

root_cause: package.json was updated (Tailwind v4 + @tailwindcss/vite) but pnpm-lock.yaml was not regenerated and committed, causing CI's frozen-lockfile enforcement to abort installation.

preferred_fix.strategy: Regenerate and commit the lockfile so CI frozen installs succeed
commands: git commit -m "fix: regenerate pnpm lockfile for CI"

verification: Render build logs show dependency installation completing

temporary_fallback.strategy: Allow non-frozen installs in CI until lockfile is fixed

one_sentence_justification: Regenerating and committing the lockfile realigns dependency state so pnpm's frozen-lockfile CI mode can install dependencies deterministically.
